Event: Titanic Excavation - Feb 2026
Event Date: 12/02/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI302
Bold Aura Ring

For the duration of the battle, incoming damage against all enemy units that are electrified or are afflicted with electric pulse is increased by 15%

Once in a while, the unit casts electric pulse upon the attack target and 3 enemy units nearest to it for 3 sec. Every time the unit affected with electric pulse uses an ability, a lightning bolt hits it, causing it and all enemy units in a small radius to receive 180000 magic damage. All affected enemy units are also stunned for 1 sec. As well, the ability's primary target has its physical and magic armor reduced by 15% for 3 sec., and receives 180000 magic damage for 3 sec.

Once in a while, when an enemy unit is electrified or afflicted with electric pulse, the ring's wearer makes all enemies that are electrified or afflicted with electric pulse explode, dealing pure damage equal to 150% of own attack to them.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
